nodes.norm_label: slash command (markdown prompt invoked by user)

nodes.label: frontmatter field: allowed-tools (string|array, restrict tool access, supports Bash(git:*) filters)
nodes.norm_label: frontmatter field: allowed-tools (string|array, restrict tool access, supports bash(git:*) filters)

nodes.label: frontmatter field: argument-hint (string, documents [arg1] [arg2] for autocomplete)

nodes.label: frontmatter field: disable-model-invocation (boolean, prevent SlashCommand tool from invoking)
nodes.norm_label: frontmatter field: disable-model-invocation (boolean, prevent slashcommand tool from invoking)

nodes.label: Critical: commands are instructions FOR Claude, not messages TO users (write as directives, not descriptions)
nodes.norm_label: critical: commands are instructions for claude, not messages to users (write as directives, not descriptions)

nodes.label: ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} env var: portable absolute path to plugin directory, essential for multi-file plugins
nodes.norm_label: ${claude_plugin_root} env var: portable absolute path to plugin directory, essential for multi-file plugins

nodes.label: Skill anatomy: SKILL.md (required) + scripts/, references/, assets/ (optional)
nodes.norm_label: skill anatomy: skill.md (required) + scripts/, references/, assets/ (optional)

nodes.label: Skill frontmatter description must use third person + specific trigger phrases ("This skill should be used when the user asks to ...")
nodes.norm_label: skill frontmatter description must use third person + specific trigger phrases ("this skill should be used when the user asks to ...")

nodes.label: Skill body writing style: imperative/infinitive form, never second person
nodes.norm_label: skill body writing style: imperative/infinitive form, never second person

nodes.label: Keep SKILL.md lean (1,500-2,000 words target, <5k max); detail goes to references/
nodes.norm_label: keep skill.md lean (1,500-2,000 words target, <5k max); detail goes to references/

nodes.label: Skill name+description metadata determines when Claude activates the skill (always in context, ~100 words)
nodes.norm_label: skill name+description metadata determines when claude activates the skill (always in context, ~100 words)

nodes.label: Plugin settings pattern: .claude/plugin-name.local.md (YAML frontmatter + markdown body, gitignored)
nodes.norm_label: plugin settings pattern: .claude/plugin-name.local.md (yaml frontmatter + markdown body, gitignored)

nodes.label: Markdown body extraction: awk '/^---$/{i++; next} i>=2' file (handles --- inside body)
nodes.norm_label: markdown body extraction: awk '/^---$/{i++; next} i>=2' file (handles --- inside body)

nodes.label: Quick-exit pattern in hooks: if [[ ! -f STATE_FILE ]]; then exit 0; fi (graceful inactive)
nodes.norm_label: quick-exit pattern in hooks: if [[ ! -f state_file ]]; then exit 0; fi (graceful inactive)

nodes.label: Enabled flag pattern: enabled: true/false allows temporary deactivation without deleting file
nodes.norm_label: enabled flag pattern: enabled: true/false allows temporary deactivation without deleting file

nodes.label: Atomic file update: write to ${FILE}.tmp.$$ then mv to FILE (corruption-safe)
nodes.norm_label: atomic file update: write to ${file}.tmp.$$ then mv to file (corruption-safe)

nodes.label: Settings changes require Claude Code restart (hooks cannot be hot-swapped)
nodes.norm_label: settings changes require claude code restart (hooks cannot be hot-swapped)

nodes.label: Plugin directory layout: .claude-plugin/plugin.json (manifest), commands/, agents/, skills/, hooks/, .mcp.json, scripts/
nodes.norm_label: plugin directory layout: .claude-plugin/plugin.json (manifest), commands/, agents/, skills/, hooks/, .mcp.json, scripts/

nodes.label: plugin.json manifest: required name (kebab-case), optional version/description/author/repository/license/keywords + component path overrides
nodes.norm_label: plugin.json manifest: required name (kebab-case), optional version/description/author/repository/license/keywords + component path overrides

nodes.label: Auto-discovery: scans commands/*.md, agents/*.md, skills/*/SKILL.md, hooks/hooks.json, .mcp.json
nodes.norm_label: auto-discovery: scans commands/*.md, agents/*.md, skills/*/skill.md, hooks/hooks.json, .mcp.json

nodes.label: File naming convention: kebab-case for all plugin files/directories
nodes.norm_label: file naming convention: kebab-case for all plugin files/directories

nodes.label: Manifest path rules: relative, must start with ./, custom paths supplement (not replace) defaults
nodes.norm_label: manifest path rules: relative, must start with ./, custom paths supplement (not replace) defaults

nodes.label: AskUserQuestion tool: interactive multi-choice prompts (1-4 questions, 2-4 options each, header max 12 chars, optional multiSelect)
nodes.norm_label: askuserquestion tool: interactive multi-choice prompts (1-4 questions, 2-4 options each, header max 12 chars, optional multiselect)

nodes.label: State-carrying workflow: persist progress to .claude/*.local.md between command invocations for multi-step flows
nodes.norm_label: state-carrying workflow: persist progress to .claude/*.local.md between command invocations for multi-step flows

nodes.label: Validation patterns: argument validation, file existence checks, plugin resource validation, graceful error handling
nodes.norm_label: validation patterns: argument validation, file existence checks, plugin resource validation, graceful error handling

nodes.label: Multi-component workflow: commands orchestrate scripts + agents + skills + templates
nodes.norm_label: multi-component workflow: commands orchestrate scripts + agents + skills + templates

nodes.label: Hooks load at session start (no hot-swap)
nodes.norm_label: hooks load at session start (no hot-swap)

nodes.norm_label: pre-allow mcp tools in command frontmatter

nodes.norm_label: silent failures are unacceptable; users deserve actionable feedback; fallbacks must be explicit

nodes.norm_label: avoid generic ai aesthetics (inter, purple gradients) by committing to a bold aesthetic direction

nodes.norm_label: ask clarifying questions one at a time to ease user response burden

nodes.norm_label: do not consider setup complete until code passes type-check / syntax verification
